false_positives: Report flagged a docker container stop as warning, but it was a planned task completion matching synthetic fixture tags.
unsupported_recommendations: Recommended that the DEV automation directly apply a router firewall change, which violates the change-review flow design.
human_summary: Report is well-grounded and formatting is valid. The overall score is held at 0.85 due to one false-positive alert on a planned task completion and an unsupported recommendation for DEV automation to bypass the change staging gate.
